behavior: Local evidence keeps resume and match claims bounded and reproducible.
revision_scope: The committed Milestone 5 evidence graph, requirement diagnostics, local matching profiles, governed model lifecycle, match feedback, debugger, reviewed packet claims, native military review, and visible military-transition wording through a450f883.
platform: local macOS arm64 host; prior structured evidence covers the controlled Linux 8 GiB Essentials journey

commands.relevant_result: Canonical state records Milestone 5 as passing with structured evidence and Milestone 6 as the sole active feature.
commands.caveat: Harness validation checks state and repository contracts, not live platform behavior.

commands.relevant_result: All 25 focused frontend and mock-runtime tests passed. They cover debugger and packet review, exact military evidence, one-use review drafts, async match changes, safe output, and Rust-compatible Unicode boundaries.
commands.caveat: The tests use the development command runtime. Native command behavior is covered separately.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-application saved_match --lib --no-fail-fast; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-storage saved_match --lib --no-fail-fast; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-storage evidence_packet --lib --no-fail-fast
commands.relevant_result: All 15 focused application saved-match tests, 7 storage confirmation tests, and 7 durable packet and reviewed-export tests passed.
commands.caveat: The storage tests use isolated SQLite databases and do not read user data.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel --lib saved_match_debugger --no-fail-fast; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel --lib resume_military_transition --no-fail-fast
commands.relevant_result: Two debugger serialization and argument tests and three military command boundary tests passed, including the fixed renderer-safe confirmation projection.
commands.caveat: No installed desktop process or native dialog ran in this focused command test.

commands.relevant_result: All 318 maintained document and matching tests passed; one private-path smoke test remained explicitly ignored.
commands.caveat: The ignored test requires private local resume paths and is not release evidence.

commands.relevant_result: All 89 default embedded local-AI tests passed with 13 explicit live-model tests ignored. Model locks, thresholds, hard negatives, poisoned-input rejection, cache health, repair, stale provenance, and fallback contracts passed.
commands.caveat: Pinned live-model calibration and the governed download lifecycle are bound by their separate structured evidence records.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-application --features embedded-ml poisoned_job_input_is_rejected_before_cache_mutation --lib --no-fail-fast
commands.relevant_result: The semantic application owner rejected poisoned job input before cache mutation.
commands.caveat: This is one focused regression; broader untrusted-input coverage also passed in the documents and local-AI owner suites.

commands.relevant_result: Documentation structure, links, prose, and canonical planning markers passed.
commands.caveat: Documentation checks do not prove runtime behavior.

commands.relevant_result: All 852 script and repository-contract tests passed, including state selection, v3 disposition, security boundaries, package verification, and cross-platform command routing.
commands.caveat: Script contracts are deterministic checks and do not replace installed release-platform proof.

commands.relevant_result: Security sensors and secret scanning passed for the evidence, model, storage, IPC, and renderer boundaries.
commands.caveat: Static security checks supplement the focused behavior tests and adversarial reviews.

commands.command: npm run lint; npm run typecheck; npm run lint:file-size; npm run lint:tauri-invokes; npm run lint:architecture; cargo fmt --all -- --check; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo clippy -p jobsentinel-documents -p jobsentinel-storage -p jobsentinel-application -p jobsentinel -- -D warnings; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo clippy -p jobsentinel-local-ai --features embedded-ml -- -D warnings; git diff --check
commands.relevant_result: Frontend lint and types, file ownership, native command registration, architecture, Rust formatting, strict affected-owner Clippy, and patch whitespace passed.
commands.caveat: Focused verification was used instead of the full workspace and browser suites.

commands.command: Read-only adversarial Milestone 5 and Gate 4 closure review
commands.relevant_result: Review confirmed that the implementation satisfies the seven Milestone 5 criteria and that Gate 4 closes on decisions while later release proofs remain explicitly assigned.
commands.caveat: The review was static; live platform gaps remain named below.

completion.evidence_graph: Current opaque citations join requirement, saved-match, case-file, and reviewed packet workflows without duplicating source text.
completion.matching: Five requirement states, hard constraints, seniority and recency signals, explicit profession and regional profiles, blockers, and why-not diagnostics remain bounded and deterministic.
completion.military_transition: User-confirmed occupation, responsibility, credential, and optional clearance evidence is reviewed beside proposed wording; confirmation returns only the safe civilian projection and fixed non-verification boundaries.
completion.local_models: Model-free matching is the default. Qwen3 retrieval and reranking use the exact lock-owned pair, calibrated thresholds, stale-vector rebuilds, and deterministic fallback.
completion.model_doctor: The plain-language Local Match Check is the Model Doctor surface. It reports lock-owned model status and integrity, keeps fallback visible, and permits native-reviewed repair only for integrity-invalid governed caches.
completion.review_surfaces: Recent saved matches expose local feedback, debugger evidence confirmation, reviewed packet claims, and military wording review.

gate_4.model_and_setup: Deterministic model-free matching is default; stronger-local uses only the exact Qwen3 Candle pair after explicit setup; MiniLM remains a legacy verified fallback; external AI is disabled and is not a matching provider.
gate_4.employer_data: Live-first source-specific evidence plus local user history is the minimum. Optional static source packs require source-specific license, size, cadence, provenance, and expiry review.
gate_4.regional_data: Optional static Region packs have no executable, credential, external-AI, or network authority. Live sources keep separate manifests and grants.
gate_4.expiry: Runtime source manifests own verified_on plus max_age_days. Static reviewed_on is visible provenance, not network authority or a universal expiry.
gate_4.essentials: Essentials is model-free. The numeric thresholds in the evaluation and release bar are approved only for their measured platforms; the stronger-local payload remains lock-owned at 2406043460 bytes.

retained_release_gaps.gap: Employer dossier accuracy, conflicts, freshness, uncertainty, and novice task completion are not yet release-proven.
Region-pack fixtures, pay and location normalization, taxonomy bridges, Qwen3 terminology behavior, lifecycle, and manual review are not yet release-proven.
Exact Windows 11 and macOS 26 installed behavior, full platform matrices, signed and notarized artifacts, SBOMs, attestations, and public downloads remain unproven.
